1.sql: SELECT fylkesnummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke WHERE fylkesnavn ILIKE 'Finnmark'

1.description: Retrieve Finnmark county geometry and fylkesnummer using exact match or ILIKE to avoid 0 rows

2.description: Retrieve all municipalities (kommuner) in Finnmark county using fylkesnummer from step 1

3.description: Retrieve 200-year flood zones (flomsoner) intersecting Finnmark county

4.description: Retrieve all buildings (matrikkelenbygning) intersecting Finnmark county

5.description: Spatial join buildings (step 4) with 200-year flood zones (step 3) to find buildings in flood zones

6.description: Spatial join buildings in flood zones (step 5) with municipalities (step 2) to assign kommunenummer

7.description: Aggregate buildings in flood zones by kommunenummer and count

8.description: Join municipality names to kommunenummer for readability

9.description: Sort municipalities by building count in flood zones (descending)
